Βίτων, ωνος, ὁ (Diod S 14, 53, 6) Bito, a Roman whose praenomen was Valerius, w. others the bearer of 1 Cl; s. 65:1.

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1
